summary: Playback runs noticeably slow (~7% off), making the second set feel sluggish and detracting from enjoyment.
review: The sole reviewer reports that this FOB recording plays about seven percent slower than it should, especially affecting the second set where the tempo feels dragged. No comments were made about sound clarity or instrument balance, but the speed issue alone leads to a low overall impression of both the performance and the transfer.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a 2‑star rating focused on a major speed problem; no positive aspects mentioned, so rating reflects the negative sentiment and technical flaw.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback appears ~7% slower than original, causing sluggish feel; no other audio quality details provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as too slow due to speed issue, impacting perceived pacing.
